commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=1f4c3a80182d36aff1a7a296675f735386600ead)
commands.review_summary:
The PR restructures the chat workbench DOM around a new `chat-workbench__main` flex column and adds CSS for that wrapper.

PR surface: Source +25. Total +25 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible: the PR branch renders the rail before closing `.chat-workbench__main`, while the CSS grid requires the rail to be a first-level `.chat-workbench` child. A live browser screenshot is still missing for the visual behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor action for the DOM nesting fix and redacted real browser proof; ClawSweeper should not repair an external PR that still lacks after-fix proof.

target.title: fix(ui): reflow composer beside workspace rail
target.body:
## Summary

- Reflow the chat composer inside the main chat column when the right workspace rail is open.
- Keep the existing workspace file rail as the adjacent grid column, so the composer no longer extends underneath it.
- Add a small `chat-workbench__main` wrapper to keep the thread, queue affordances, side result, new-message control, and composer in the same column.

This is intentionally scoped to the existing workspace rail layout. Follow-up work can change what the rail shows without mixing in this layout fix.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-ui-workspace-rail-reflow.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/ui.js build`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts ui/src/styles/chat/sidebar.css`
target.author: solvely-colin
